mapper.sql: homepage_id, TO_CHAR(str_date, 'yyyy-MM-dd') AS str_date, TO_CHAR(end_date, 'yyyy-MM-dd') AS end_date, TO_CHAR(str_date, 'HH24:mi') AS str_time, TO_CHAR(end_date, 'HH24:mi') AS end_time, res_msg, use_yn, add_date, add_id, mod_date, mod_id
mapper.select: SELECT , CASE WHEN str_date <= SYSDATE AND end_date >= SYSDATE AND use_yn = 'Y' THEN '1' ELSE '0' END AS date_chk FROM HOPE_CONFIG WHERE homepage_id = #{homepage_id}
mapper.update: MERGE INTO HOPE_CONFIG a USING DUAL ON (homepage_id = #{homepage_id}) WHEN MATCHED THEN UPDATE SET str_date = TO_DATE(#{str_date}, 'yyyy-MM-dd HH24:mi'), end_date = TO_DATE(#{end_date}, 'yyyy-MM-dd HH24:mi'), res_msg = #{res_msg}, use_yn = #{use_yn}, mod_date = SYSDATE, mod_id = #{add_id} WHEN NOT MATCHED THEN INSERT ( homepage_id, str_date, end_date, res_msg, use_yn, add_date, add_id ) VALUES ( #{homepage_id}, TO_DATE(#{str_date}, 'yyyy-MM-dd HH24:mi'), TO_DATE(#{end_date}, 'yyyy-MM-dd HH24:mi'), #{res_msg}, #{use_yn}, SYSDATE, #{add_id} )
mapper.select:
SELECT
FROM HOPE_CONFIG WHERE homepage_id = #{homepage_id} AND str_date <= SYSDATE AND end_date >= SYSDATE AND use_yn = 'Y'
